//: Declarative package set for the universal container env. nixpkgs attrs.
//1: Managed by chezmoi at devbox's canonical global path so devbox uses it natively.
//2: Edit-in-repo flow:  chezmoi edit this file -> chezmoi apply -> devbox global install.
//3: Live flow inside container:  devbox global add foo  ->  chezmoi add ~/.local/share/devbox/global/default/devbox.json  to capture it back.
//4: Find names with `devbox search <name>`; pin with name@x.y.
